title: picea excelsa var. rhombica
intro: Picea excelsa var. rhombica, also known as the Himalayan spruce, is a variant of the Picea excelsa tree species found in the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Picea excelsa var. rhombica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the needles and bark of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
